title: Dashboard PDFs Issues
excerpt: Every time I export a PDF report from a Dashboard it cuts off some of the columns so it’s not a complete PDF report of all my columns and rows.

posts.author: MichelleGugg (MichelleGugg)
posts.cookedHtml: Every time I export a PDF report from a Dashboard it cuts off some of the columns so it’s not a complete PDF report of all my columns and rows.
